# Circuit Diagram Maker

Circuit Diagram Maker is a specialized, high-performance web application designed for creating, simulating, and sharing professional electronic circuit diagrams.

- URL: https://www.circuitdiagrammaker.com
- Contact: support@circuit-diagram.org
- Sitemap: https://www.circuitdiagrammaker.com/sitemap-index.xml

## AI Usage Policy
We allow AI agents to crawl and index the content of this site for the purpose of providing summaries, search results, and coding assistance related to circuit design.

## Directive
Allow: *

## Core Features
1. **Interactive Canvas**: Built heavily around HTML5 canvas for high performance, drag-and-drop interactions, and immediate visual feedback.
2. **Standard Libraries**: Contains over 40+ IEC and ANSI compliant symbols.
3. **Smart Routing**: Our custom Manhattan routing ensures lines stay perfectly orthogonal.
4. **File Operations**: Saves to local JSON schemas and exports to SVG and high-DPI PNGs.

## Language Support
The application features full localized landing pages across 18 distinct locales including Spanish, Hindi, Russian, and Arabic. 

For more information or integrations, explore the main repository or the interactive editor at `/editor/`.
